problem: A/C in Hillsboro for L/H wing damage
action: Ground tug hit aircraft between fuselage & left engine. Replaced left fuselage forward skin and deck bulkhead w/ new. Remove left propeller, engine and left wing to replace lower IB wing skin w/ new. Installed wing w/ new gap seal. Remove left flap & install new flap. Install left engine. Install left propeller after inspection & repair by Propworks. Perform small fiberglass repair on left side of nose bowl & left engine front right engine cowl. Prep new skins & flap w/ etch & alodine, epoxy prime & paint w/ Matterhorn white, Dark green, and Copper mettalic. Rig flaps & ailerons, check gear rigging, perform gear retraction & emergency extension. Perform functional checks of all engine gauges & lights. Perform engine run up, Ops check good, no leaks. Replace AMSafe w/ s/nn A09APR25-26. Expires 4/1/2026. Test AMSafe system AMSafe test box, Ops check good. All work done IAW Piper PA44-180 Maintenance manual.
